reference: Hello, from where was the angioplasty performed? If it was done from the groin and you are feeling numbness in your feet afterward, get a Doppler ultrasound of the leg arteries and veins done to rule out any hematoma or arteriovenous fistula.
text: Hello from where was the inguinal clasp performed? If it was done from the groin, and you are feeling numbness in your feet afterwards, get a Doppler ultrasound of the leg arteries and veins done to rule out any hematoma or arterial venous fistula.
